title: Add Author Section to README
description: Insert an 'Author' section into the project's README.md file to credit the main contributor(s).
details: Open the README.md file at the project root. Add a clearly labeled 'Author' section near the end (or in a logical place if a Contributors or similar section exists). Include the author's name and, if appropriate, contact information or a link to their GitHub profile. Ensure formatting matches the rest of the README (use Markdown headings and consistent style).
test_strategy: Review the updated README.md in a Markdown viewer to confirm the 'Author' section appears correctly, is free of typos, and does not disrupt existing formatting. Optionally, have another team member review for clarity and accuracy.
